201.description: Login successful. Returns access token and sets refresh token cookie.

401.description: Invalid, expired, or missing access token

200.description: Refresh successful. Returns a new access token and sets a new refresh token cookie.

201.description: Account created successfully. Returns access token and sets refresh token cookie.

200.description: List all projects owned by the authenticated account

201.description: Project created successfully. Returns project id.

requestBody.description: Fields to update. Omitted fields are left unchanged.

400.description: Invalid project id, title, or description

requestBody.description: Prompt sent to the AI assistant

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of messages to return

200.description: List all tasks belonging to the project

204.description: Tasks generated successfully from project content

400.description: Invalid project id or project content cannot be processed

200.description: List all transcripts belonging to the project

400.description: Project with given id does not exist
Payload is not multipart, no audio file provided, or invalid project id

requestBody.description: Fields to update. Any omitted field remains unchanged.

400.description: Invalid task id or update data
